sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109968" key="u(yi/luxnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψῐ´-λυχνος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐγή,</foreign> illumination <sense id="n109968.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">by a light hung on high,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
